title: tectaria gaboonensis
intro: Tectaria gaboonensis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the Gabon fern or the rattan fern. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria gaboonensis include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are believed to provide these medicinal benefits.
